Our clean, natural ingredients are selected for their quality and sustainability, with a dedicated team constantly focused on finding the ideal ingredients for maximum taste.
Bullet Point 4: NON-GMO, FAIRTRADE CHOCOLATE - We care about the farmers who grow the cocoa that we use in our products, and we’re dedicated to supporting communities that practice sustainable farming practices. We commit to paying premiums so that you can be sure that our chocolate, made in America, uses fair trade cocoa that can be traced back to Fairtrade farms in West Africa.
Bullet Point 5: WHY WE DO IT: 10% of annual net profits support conservation efforts protecting wildlife and their habitats. With over $1.4 million generated in the past three years alone, each chocolate purchase adds up to big support that helps wildlife thrive.

Each bar has only a handful of real, responsibly sourced, health conscious ingredients no artificial sweeteners or additives. From rich and creamy to dark and dreamy, we’ve got a taste for every occasion. And by giving back 10% of net profits to conservation organizations, it’s making a true impact for the wildlife habitats we love. Packed withflavor and antioxidants,it’struly something to savor

catalog_content:
Item Name: Grace Hot Pepper Sauce 6oz - Hot Sauce Bottle - Jamaican Scotch Bonnet Pepper Sauce - Caribbean Hot Sauce made with Scotch Bonnet Peppers & West Indian Hot Peppers Bullet Point 1: 🌶️ Elevate your culinary creations with Grace Hot Pepper Sauce, the versatile condiment that adds a fiery kick to any dish, from traditional Jamaican favorites to international cuisines. Let your taste buds embark on a flavorful adventure. Bullet Point 2: 🍗 Experience the authentic taste of the Caribbean with Grace Hot Pepper Sauce, crafted from sun-ripened scotch bonnet peppers and aromatic spices. This pepper sauce brings the vibrant flavors of Jamaica and beyond to your kitchen table. Bullet Point 3: 🥄 Embrace the nostalgic essence of Jamaica with Grace Hot Pepper Sauce, a cherished staple in Jamaican cuisine that evokes memories of lively family gatherings, vibrant street markets, and the warm hospitality of the island. Bullet Point 4: 🥘 Ignite your taste buds and spice up your life with our scotch bonnet pepper sauce, the ultimate companion for heat lovers and adventurous foodies alike. This super hot sauce Jamaican is guaranteed to add a delightful kick to every bite! Bullet Point 5: 💯 Grace Hot Pepper Sauce is crafted by Grace Foods, the cornerstone of Jamaica's culinary scene for over 100 years. It's not just a hot sauce; it's a piece of Jamaican history that has been a staple in Jamaican households for generations. Product Description: Discover the fiery essence of the Caribbean with Grace Hot Pepper Sauce, a beloved staple in Jamaican and Caribbean cuisine. This versatile hot pepper sauce is crafted from the finest, sun-ripened scotch bonnet peppers, expertly blended with a medley of aromatic spices and seasonings. Grace Hot Pepper Sauce adds a delightful kick to any dish.

In Jamaica, Grace Hot Pepper Sauce is more than just a condiment; it's a cherished part of the island's culinary heritage. The nostalgic aroma of this Jamaican hot sauce simmering in the kitchen evokes memories of lively family gatherings, vibrant street markets, and the warm embrace of Jamaican hospitality. From the bustling streets of Kingston to the serene beaches of Negril, Grace Hot Pepper Sauce is a constant companion in the hearts and homes of Jamaicans.

But the magic of Grace Hot Pepper Sauce extends far beyond the shores of Jamaica. Across the Caribbean, from Trinidad and Tobago to Barbados and Guyana, this Caribbean hot sauce is a beloved condiment that adds a distinct Caribbean flair to any meal.

With Grace Hot Pepper Sauce, you can embark on a culinary adventure and explore the vibrant flavors of Jamaican and Caribbean cuisine. Elevate your jerk chicken with a generous splash of this fiery pepper sauce, adding depth and complexity to the smoky, spicy marinade. Drizzle it over a hearty plate of rice and peas, allowing the heat to mingle with the creamy coconut undertones. Or, add a few dashes to your favorite seafood dishes, from grilled snapper to spicy shrimp.

But Grace Hot Pepper Sauce isn't just limited to traditional Jamaican and Caribbean dishes. Its versatility knows no bounds. Use it to spice up your soups, stews, and chilis, adding a layer of heat that will warm you from the inside out. Mix it into your marinades and dressings for a spicy twist on classic flavors. Or, simply dollop it onto your eggs, sandwiches, or burgers for a quick and easy flavor boost. Value: 6.0 Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Mid-tier Caribbean hot sauce with strong heritage branding and cultural appeal, positioned as a versatile kitchen staple. Standard 6 fl oz glass bottle suggests a balance between premium packaging (glass) and mass-market accessibility. The 'Very Hot' variant and Jamaican heritage may justify a slightly higher price than generic hot sauces, but lacks premium certifications or organic claims. Value perception is tied to authenticity and spice intensity rather than health or luxury attributes.

Product Description: Chana besan (gram flour) is made from chickpeas and is used in a variety of ways in Indian cookery. Chana besan has a light yellow color and matte texture. With an earthy dry aroma, the flour has a nutty flavor. Curries, pakoras, and snack foods are made by using Chana besan. The flour is also used in homemade beauty products, often made into a paste and applied as an exfoliating facial scrub.
